prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年山东省综合类最低位次分别约61611、55196、55310、61868、57862名，整体呈波动走势，2022–2023年位次明显前移（竞争加剧），2024年大幅后移 至61868名，2025年小幅回升至57862名；近两年波动幅度约4000名，2025年基准位次约57862名；该校在山东省综合类招生计划：2021年802人（含大类），2022 年166人，2023年170人，2024年219人，2025年219人，2026年240人，较2025年扩招21人（+9.6%），扩招幅度较为明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 中 国石油大学（北京）克拉玛依校区为211工程、双一流建设高校，校本部软科主榜排名约第62名（2026年），校区与校本部共享211/双一流身份，办学层次明确；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度及投档异常文件中均未出现显著记录，表明近年无重大舆情事件或投档断档信号，报考心理相对平稳；校本部（中国石油大学（北 京））在石油与天然气工程等学科领域具有传统优势，克拉玛依校区以石油石化类工科专业为主干，相关专业对考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息 /通信等专业社会热度持续高热，石油工程、化学工程与工艺等传统工科热度一般；山东省2026年高考报名总人数约72万人，较2025年约68.1万人增加约3.9万人（+5.7%），考生 规模扩大加剧整体竞争；该校位于新疆克拉玛依市，与山东 省距离较远，属于跨省异地校区招生，地域偏好对部分考生报考意愿有一定抑制。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合20 25年基准位次57862名、2026年扩招约9.6%（扩招使位次后移）、山东省考生规模扩大约5.7%（加剧竞争）、以及该校跨省地域偏好的综合影响，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025 年明显后移；预测最低位次约61992名，区间61492–62492名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间61492–62492名内，建议以二档专业（石油工程、新能源、数学等）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机类、自动化、会计学）可作为冲刺选择，三档专业（化工、环 境、资源勘查等）作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（<61492名）可重点冲刺一档热门专业；位次接近区间上限（约62492名）建议以三档保底为主。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Shandong comprehensive category were approximately 61611, 55196, 55310, 61868, and 57862 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend. Rankings moved significantly forward in 2022–2023 (intensified competition), then dropped sharply to 61868 in 2024, and slightly recovered to 57862 in 2025. The fluctuation range in recent two years is about 4000 positions, with a baseline ranking of approximately 57862 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Shandong comprehensive category: 802 in 2021 (including broad categories), 166 in 2022, 170 in 2023, 219 in 2024, 219 in 2025, and 240 in 2026, an increase of 21 students (+9.6%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively significant expansion and helps alleviate competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: China University of Petroleum (Beijing) Karamay Campus is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university. The main campus ranks approximately 62nd on the Soft Science main ranking (2026). The campus shares the 211/Double First-Class status with the main campus, with a clear educational level. No significant records of reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or abnormal admission files were found, indicating no major public opinion incidents or admission gaps in recent years, resulting in relatively stable application psychology. The main campus (China University of Petroleum (Beijing)) has traditional advantages in disciplines such as petroleum and natural gas engineering, while the Karamay Campus focuses on petroleum and petrochemical engineering majors, which have certain appeal to candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geographic Location
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like computer science, electronic information/communication remain highly popular, while traditional engineering majors such as petroleum engineering and chemical engineering and technology have average popularity. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Shandong college entrance examination is approximately 720,000, an increase of about 39,000 (+5.7%) from approximately 681,000 in 2025, intensifying overall competition. The university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Shandong Province, and as a cross-provincial off-campus enrollment site, geographic preferences may somewhat suppress some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 57862, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 9.6% (which pushes rankings backward), the increase in Shandong candidate numbers by about 5.7% (intensifying competition), and the cross-provincial geographic preference, it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will significantly drop compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 61992, with a range of 61492–62492.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 61492–62492, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Petroleum Engineering, New Energy, Mathematics, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 majors (Computer Science, Automation, Accounting) as sprint options, and Tier 3 majors (Chemical Engineering, Environment, Resource Exploration, etc.) as safety choices. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<61492), prioritize sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (around 62492), it is advisable to mainly rely on Tier 3 safety choices.
